languages.text:
When activated, the character consumes one stack of potential energy, and their melee attacks gain {uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} bonus Electrical Damage until the end of the turn.
(Cannot be used if the character is not wielding a melee weapon)

traits.locale_text:
When activated, the character consumes one stack of potential energy, and their melee attacks gain {uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} bonus Electrical Damage until the end of the turn.
(Cannot be used if the character is not wielding a melee weapon)

languages.text:
When activated, −1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stack is removed from the wearer. Until the end of the turn, their melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage.
This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped.

The ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped.

This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped.

languages.text:
При активации все уровни {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g} снимаются, а атаки персонажа {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}в ближнем бою{/g} наносят +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} дополнительно.
Эта {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} доступна только при наличии оружия ближнего боя.

languages.text:
Wenn aktiviert, werden alle {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}-Stapel entfernt und die {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriffe{/g} des Trägers verursachen +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}.
Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} ist nur aktiv, wenn der Träger eine Nahkampfwaffe ausgerüstet hat.

languages.text:
Al activarlo, se pierden todas las acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g} y los {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataques cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} del usuario obtienen +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g}.
Esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} solo está activa cuando el portador tiene un arma cuerpo a cuerpo equipada.

languages.text:
Etkinleştirildiğinde tüm {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimleri ortadan kalkar ve takan kişinin {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırıları{/g} +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} kazanır.
Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}, takan kişi yalnızca yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa aktiftir.

When activated, all {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed, and the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} gain +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}.
This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped.

traits.locale_text:

languages.text:
激活时，移除所有{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}层数，且装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}额外造成{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。
此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}仅在装备者装备近战武器时生效。

traits.locale_text:
激活时，移除所有{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}层数，且装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}额外造成{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。
此{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}仅在装备者装备近战武器时生效。

languages.text:
Une fois cet effet activé, tous les cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g} sont supprimés et les {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaques de mêlée{/g} de l'utilisateur gagnent +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g}.
Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} est active uniquement lorsque l'utilisateur est équipé d'une arme de mêlée.

Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} est active uniquement lorsque l'utilisateur est équipé d'une arme de mêlée.

languages.text:
使用すると、-1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}ポテンシャルエネルギー{/g} が装備者に消費される。ターン終了まで、装備者の近接攻撃は+ {uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} 衝撃ダメージを追加する。
この能力は、装備者が近接武器を装備している時のみ有効。
